title: Brand-theme mapping manifest (registry-served)
description: The PER-STACK mapping from generic brand tokens to that stack's theme variables. NOTE: the brand KIT itself (logo/palette/type) is per-project user data, NOT registry-served — only this token->variable mapping lives here. DRAFT 2026-06-29 — ahead of the consuming engine; see docs/design/aira-capability-manifests.md sec.5. Not yet wired into validate.mjs.

id.description: the stack id this mapping targets, e.g. eds

mapping.description: dotted brand-token path -> stack theme variable, e.g. "color.primary": "--color-brand"
